name: storacha-export
description: Rescue your data out of Storacha (web3.storage) before shutdown — downloads every upload and reconstructs the original file tree on disk.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{new(require('better-sqlite3'))(':memory:').close()}catch{console.log('building better-sqlite3 from source...');require('child_process').execSync('cd node_modules/better-sqlite3 && npm run build-release',{stdio:'inherit'})}"
